name: Shiranui Swordmaster
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>不知火</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しらぬい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いくさ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>範</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>のり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is in your GY and you control 2 or more "Shiranui" monsters with different names: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. If this card is banished: You can target 1 Zombie monster you control; it gains 600 ATK until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Shiranui Swordmaster" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your GY and you control 2 or more "Shiranui" monsters with different names: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. If this card is banished: You can target 1 Zombie monster you control; it gains 600 ATK until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Shiranui Swordmaster" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your GY and you control 2 or more "Shiranui" monsters with different names: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. If this card is banished: You can target 1 Zombie monster you control; it gains 600 ATK until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Shiranui Swordmaster" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
